segment.source: Renders one rich-text passage lifted onto a distinct background (muted, primary, or bordered) with an optional heading, left or center alignment, and an optional call-to-action button. Use it for: key statements, mission or value blurbs, boxed summaries, promotional paragraphs, and announcements pulled out of long body text. Prefer 'Callout Box' for short color-coded notices or warnings; use 'Full-Width CTA Banner' when the passage exists only to drive one button click.
